name: Dreamer RP
description:
This is for your dreamer AU (if you have one). Basically, a dreamer AU is like Yume Nikki, where the protagonist navigates through their dreams and collects effects. The dreams often have messages that have to do with something that happened in their life. Ok I really need to stop yapping.

(Dreamcore go brrr)
creator: evelynnexists
